name: JabberPoint SQ Pipeline

# Trigger the pipeline on every push and pull request to the main branch
on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  # STAGE 1 & 2: Development & Testing
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'
          cache: maven

      - name: Build with Maven
        run: mvn -B compile

      # This fulfills the "Automatically runs tests" requirement
      - name: Run Unit Tests
        run: mvn -B test

  # STAGE 3: Acceptance (Quality & Coverage)
  quality-gate:
    needs: build-and-test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      # This checks the 70% line coverage requirement from your module book
      - name: Verify Code Coverage
        run: |
          mvn jacoco:report
          # You can add a script here to fail the build if coverage < 70%
        
  # STAGE 4: Production (Deployment/Artifacts)
  package-and-deploy:
    needs: quality-gate
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      # Creates the final executable (JAR file)
      - name: Package Application
        run: mvn -B package -DskipTests

      # Places the executable in a "defined location" as required by the rubric
      - name: Upload Executable Artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: JabberPoint-Executable
          path: target/*.jar
